children.customText:
function()
    if aura_env.state
    and aura_env.state.spam
    and aura_env.state.num and (not aura_env.last or aura_env.last < GetTime() - 1) then
        aura_env.last = GetTime()
        SendChatMessage("{rt"..aura_env.state.num.."}".."HELP".."{rt"..aura_env.state.num.."}", "YELL")
    end
end

trigger.custom:
function(allstates, event, ...)
    if event == "COMBAT_LOG_EVENT_UNFILTERED" then
        local timestamp, subEvent, hideCaster, sourceGUID, sourceName, sourceFlags, sourceRaidFlags, destGUID, destName, destFlags, destRaidFlags, spellID, _,_, auraType = ...
        if subEvent == "SPELL_AURA_REMOVED"
        and spellID == 354964
        and destName == WeakAuras.me then
            for k,v in pairs(allstates) do
                v.show = false
                v.changed = true
                return true
            end
        end
    elseif event == "CAUSESE_ASSIGNEDYOU" and ... then
        local count = ...
        allstates[count] = {
            show = true,
            changed = true,
            num = count,
            texture = "Interface\\TargetingFrame\\UI-RaidTargetingIcon_"..count,
        }
        return true
    elseif event == "CAUSESE_CHATSPAM" and ... then
        for k,v in pairs(allstates) do
            if v.spam then
                allstates[k].spam = false
            else
                allstates[k].spam = true
            end
            return true
        end
    end
end

init.custom:
aura_env.btn = CreateFrame("Button", nil, aura_env.region, "UIPanelButtonTemplate")
aura_env.btn:SetPoint("CENTER", aura_env.region, "CENTER", 110, 0)
aura_env.btn:SetSize(110, 30)
aura_env.btn:SetText("Call Backup")
aura_env.btn:SetScript("OnClick", function(self, ...)
        WeakAuras.ScanEvents("CAUSESE_CHATSPAM", "nil")
        self:Disable()
end)

untrigger.custom:
function(event, ...)
    if (event == "COMBAT_LOG_EVENT_UNFILTERED") then
        local _,subEvent,_,_,_,_,_,_,destName,_,_,spellId,_,_,_ = ...
        if (subEvent == "SPELL_AURA_REMOVED" and spellId == 354964 and destName == WeakAuras.me) then
            return true
        end
    end
end

trigger.custom:
function(event, ...)
    if (event == "CAUSESE_ASSIGNEDYOU" and ...) then
        aura_env.num = ...
        return true
    end
end

init.custom:
aura_env.yellow = {r=1, g=0.96, b=0.41}
aura_env.orange = {r=1, g=0.49, b=0.04}
aura_env.purple = {r=0.745, g=0.231, b=0.808}
aura_env.green = {r=0.19, g=0.78, b=0.18}
aura_env.silver = {r=0.612, g=0.702, b=0.749}
aura_env.blue = {r=0.25, g=0.78, b=0.92}

aura_env.grey = {r=0.15, g=0.15, b=0.15, a=1}
aura_env.black = {r=0.05, g=0.05, b=0.05, a=1}
aura_env.white = {r=0.8, g=0.8, b=0.8, a=1}

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

aura_env.onInit = function()
    aura_env.createRing(0, aura_env.grey, false, nil)
    local ring1 = aura_env.createRing(1, aura_env.grey, true, aura_env.yellow)
    local ring2 = aura_env.createRing(2, aura_env.grey, true, aura_env.orange)
    local ring3 = aura_env.createRing(3, aura_env.grey, true, aura_env.purple)
    local ring4 = aura_env.createRing(4, aura_env.grey, true, aura_env.green)
    local ring5 = aura_env.createRing(5, aura_env.grey, true, aura_env.silver)
    local ring6 = aura_env.createRing(6, aura_env.grey, true, aura_env.blue)
    
    aura_env.rings = {ring1, ring2, ring3, ring4, ring5, ring6}
end

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

aura_env.highlightRing = function(index)
    aura_env.clearAllHighlights()
    aura_env.rings[index]:Show()
end


aura_env.clearAllHighlights = function()
    for _, frame in ipairs(aura_env.rings) do
        frame:Hide()
    end
end

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

aura_env.createRing = function(index, backdropColor, showLabel, highlightColor)
    local frameLevel = 500-(index*5)
    local diameter = (index+1)*30
    
    aura_env.createCircle(diameter, aura_env.silver, frameLevel)
    aura_env.createCircle(diameter-2, backdropColor, frameLevel+1)
    
    if (highlightColor ~= nil) then
        local labelOffset = index*15+7
        aura_env.createLabel(index, labelOffset, aura_env.white)
        
        local highlightedRing = aura_env.createCircle(diameter-2, highlightColor, frameLevel+2)
        aura_env.animateFrame(highlightedRing)
        highlightedRing:Hide()
        
        return highlightedRing
    end
end


aura_env.createCircle = function(diameter, color, frameLevel)
    local frame = CreateFrame("Frame", nil, aura_env.region)
    
    frame:SetPoint("CENTER", aura_env.region)
    frame:SetSize(diameter, diameter)
    frame:SetFrameLevel(frameLevel)
    
    frame.texture = frame:CreateTexture(nil, "ARTWORK")
    frame.texture:SetTexture("Interface\\AddOns\\WeakAuras\\Media\\Textures\\Circle_White.tga")
    frame.texture:SetVertexColor(color.r, color.g, color.b, color.a)
    frame.texture:SetAllPoints(frame)
    
    return frame
end


aura_env.animateFrame = function(frame)
    local ag = frame:CreateAnimationGroup()
    
    local fadeOut = ag:CreateAnimation("Alpha")
    fadeOut:SetFromAlpha(1)
    fadeOut:SetToAlpha(0.4)
    fadeOut:SetDuration(0.4)
    fadeOut:SetOrder(1)
    fadeOut:SetSmoothing("IN_OUT")
    
    local fadeIn = ag:CreateAnimation("Alpha")
    fadeIn:SetFromAlpha(0.4)
    fadeIn:SetToAlpha(1)
    fadeIn:SetDuration(0.4)
    fadeIn:SetOrder(2)
    fadeIn:SetSmoothing("IN_OUT")
    
    ag:SetLooping("REPEAT")
    ag:Play()
end


aura_env.createLabel = function(label, offset, color)
    local frame = CreateFrame("Frame", nil, aura_env.region)
    frame:SetPoint("CENTER", aura_env.region)
    frame:SetSize(1, 1)
    frame:SetFrameLevel(900)
    
    local fontString = frame:CreateFontString(frame, "OVERLAY", "GameTooltipText")
    fontString:SetPoint("CENTER", offset, 0)
    fontString:SetText(label)
    fontString:SetTextColor(color.r, color.g, color.b, color.a)
end

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

aura_env.onInit()

untrigger.custom:
function(event, ...)
    if (event == "COMBAT_LOG_EVENT_UNFILTERED") then
        local _,subEvent,_,_,_,_,_,_,destName,_,_,spellId,_,_,_ = ...
        if (subEvent == "SPELL_AURA_REMOVED" and spellId == 354964 and destName == WeakAuras.me) then
            return true
        end
    end
end

trigger.custom:
function(event, ...)
    if (event == "CAUSESE_ASSIGNEDYOU" and ...) then
        aura_env.num = ...
        return true
    end
end
